MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES
Off Calendar Sep-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Air Service Corporation's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiffs are ordered to provide complete verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $650 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
